universe, has stated that the seven categories headed by Dravyas
or substances constitute its material cause. According to some
Time is the root cause of the universe. There are others like the
Laukayatikas who have declared that nature or the inherent pro-
perties of substances were responsible for the emergence of the
universe. There are also some who opine that actions of beings
are its cause.
[Here the author alludes to five theories about the origin of
the universe. There are six Padarthas or Categories according to
the Vaise§ikas, twentyfive according to the Sahkhyas and twenty-
seven according to the followers of Palaujali. 'Die Dravyas or
substances are nine i.e. the five elements. Time, Space, Soul and
Mind.]
